And Microsoft Build wasn't even the only big event to happen this week. Out in Taiwan, there was the Computex event where Nvidia made a series of announcements themselves. The biggest announcement, in my opinion, is the RTX Spark. This is a new chip that Nvidia developed that's both essentially a GPU and a CPU in one.
